name: Score Golden Ratio Grow Demo

phrases.comment: Three even pulses totaling 1.5 seconds before the score transform.
Two even pulses totaling 1.0 second before the score transform.

score_transforms.comment: Grows each voice independently on duration by GOLDEN_RATIO while keeping the pulse inside each voice even.
score_transforms.name: score_golden_ratio_grow

description: Demonstrates score_golden_ratio_grow by lengthening each voice independently while preserving a simple even pulse.
